name: Elevar Server-Side Tracking API
what_it_does: Elevar server-side conversion tracking REST API for Shopify DTC brands to implement accurate GA4, Meta Conversions API, TikTok, Pinterest, and Snapchat tracking through server-side event routing that bypasses ad blockers and iOS 14+ privacy restrictions for marketing attribution accuracy improvement. Enables AI agents to manage server-side event configuration for Shopify tracking automation, handle GA4 server-side event forwarding for Google Analytics accuracy automation, access Meta Conversions API integration for Facebook ad attribution automation, retrieve TikTok Events API integration for TikTok ad measurement automation, manage event deduplication for cross-channel tracking accuracy automation, handle customer data enrichment for enhanced tracking automation, access conversion data quality reporting for attribution accuracy automation, retrieve real-time event stream monitoring for tracking health automation, manage consent mode integration for GDPR-compliant tracking automation, and integrate Elevar with Shopify, GA4, Meta, TikTok, and DTC ad platforms for end-to-end server-side tracking automation.
use_cases: Implementing Shopify server-side GA4 tracking from DTC analytics accuracy agents
Routing Meta Conversions API events from Facebook ad attribution agents
Monitoring conversion tracking quality from DTC tracking health agents
Deduplicating client and server events from cross-channel tracking agents
not_for: Full analytics platform (Elevar is tracking infrastructure, not analytics)
B2B SaaS tracking (Elevar is DTC e-commerce conversion tracking focused)
best_when: A Shopify DTC brand wanting AI agents to automate server-side conversion tracking configuration, Meta CAPI and GA4 event routing, and tracking accuracy monitoring through Elevar's Shopify-native server-side tracking platform.
avoid_when: SHOPIFY STORE REQUIRED: Elevar is built for Shopify stores; automated non-Shopify implementation requires custom configuration; automated generic e-commerce tracking without Shopify assumes platform-specific Elevar features that don't apply. TRACKING SETUP REQUIRES HUMAN CONFIGURATION: Elevar tracking configuration (data layer variables, destination connections) requires human setup through Elevar dashboard; automated pure API tracking configuration is limited; automated self-service full setup without Elevar support creates misconfigured tracking. EVENT DEDUPLICATION REQUIRES MATCHING EVENT IDs: Elevar event deduplication for client+server requires matching event IDs; automated server-side events must include same event_id as client-side pixel; automated server event without matching client event_id creates duplicate conversion counted by Meta/Google. GDPR CONSENT MUST PRECEDE SERVER EVENTS: Elevar server-side tracking with consent mode must check user consent before forwarding events; automated server event routing without consent check creates GDPR violation for EU traffic.

auth.notes: Elevar uses API key for server-side event routing. REST API with JSON. Atlanta, GA HQ. Founded 2018 by Brad Redding. Bootstrapped. Products: Server-side tracking, GA4 integration, Meta CAPI, TikTok Events API, Pinterest, Snapchat, Klaviyo, consent mode. GDPR. SOC2. Shopify Plus Partner. Serves DTC brands. Competes with Littledata for Shopify server-side tracking.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — paid plans from $450/month
pricing.paid_tiers: Launch: $450/month; Scale: $900/month; Enterprise: custom; by monthly orders
pricing.notes: Atlanta GA. Bootstrapped. Monthly subscription by order volume. Shopify Plus customers common.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; event routing APIs high-throughput; webhooks for tracking event monitoring

known_agent_gotchas: EVENT DEDUPLICATION REQUIRES CLIENT AND SERVER EVENT ID MATCH: Elevar server-side events must include identical event_id to client pixel event; automated server event must generate event_id before client pixel fires and pass same ID to server route; automated server event with new event_id creates duplicate conversion in Meta/Google

SERVER-SIDE EVENTS REQUIRE COMPLETE CUSTOMER DATA FOR MATCH RATE: Elevar Meta CAPI match rate depends on customer PII (email, phone, name, address); automated server event with sparse customer data creates low match rate and reduced Meta attribution; automated checkout must capture and pass all available customer identifiers

SHOPIFY ORDER WEBHOOK TRIGGERS SERVER EVENTS: Elevar server events are typically triggered by Shopify order webhooks; automated custom server-side implementation must replicate webhook trigger logic; automated arbitrary server event without Shopify event context creates disconnected tracking data

CONSENT MODE STATE MUST BE PASSED WITH EVENTS: Elevar consent mode integration requires consent state in events for GDPR-compliant destinations; automated event routing must include consent parameters; automated event without consent state creates non-compliant tracking for EU users

DESTINATION CONFIGURATION IS DASHBOARD-ONLY: Elevar tracking destinations (Meta, GA4, TikTok) are configured in Elevar dashboard not via API; automated destination configuration change requires dashboard access; automated API-only destination management creates unsupported operation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Server-side tracking. GDPR, SOC2. API key. US. Conversion and customer data routing.

security_score_components.security_notes: Server-side tracking. GDPR, SOC2. API key. US. Conversion event and customer data.
